name: Timatar Ka Salad- Fresh Tomato Salad - India
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons vegetable oil, including peanut and mustard oils
1/4 teaspoon black or yellow mustard seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes into 1/4 inch slices and arrange them in slightly overlapping layers on a large plate.
2. Place basil leaves singly among the tomato slices so that about three-quarters of each leaf is visible, distributing both green and red tomatoes evenly.
3. Sprinkle salt, black pepper, chili powder, and lemon juice over the tomatoes.
4. In a small saucepan, heat the vegetable oil (including peanut and mustard oils) over high heat until hot.
5. Add cumin seeds and mustard seeds to the pan. Once the mustard seeds begin to pop, turn off the heat and pour the oil and spices over the tomatoes, taking care not to cover the basil leaves.
6. Serve immediately.
